summary: WIN-010 c5 H5 (moderate) — "similar disc radii" phrase dead on arrival (r range is 3330–7021 km; no similar-r station pair exists). EXP-220 deletes the phrase from both detail_verdict_text (entire field replaced) and detail_evidence (block patch). Argument pivots to the ratio-vs-absolute-magnitude bite and the scaling-shape-is-generic bite, which do not depend on a similar-r claim. All five c5 issues (ISS-1390/1391/1392/1393/1394) resolved by the single EXP-220 patch. Please integrate and close.
